name: Diamond Genesis Drop #05 — Drop Calendar
description:
First look at every monthly digital drop scheduled for the next 12 months. Holders see next drop 7 days before public reveal and can claim a single guaranteed allocation.

Unlockable perk: 7-day early reveal + 1 guaranteed allocation per drop.

Membership access only. No revenue claims, no profit sharing. Educational and community-utility content. See docs/UTILITY-PERKS.md.
